paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And if his oblation be a sacrifice of peace-offerings; if he offer of the herd, whether male or female, he shall offer it without blemish before Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of his oblation, and kill it at the door of the tent of meeting: and Aaron`s sons the priests shall sprinkle the blood upon the altar round about.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he shall offer of the sacrifice of peace-offerings an offering made by fire unto Jehovah; the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is on them, which is by the loins, and the caul upon the liver, with the kidneys, shall he take away.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Aaron`s sons shall burn it on the altar upon the burnt-offering, which is upon the wood that is on the fire: it is an offering made by fire, of a sweet savor unto Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And if his oblation for a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto Jehovah be of the flock; male or female, he shall offer it without blemish.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: If he offer a lamb for his oblation, then shall he offer it before Jehovah;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and he shall lay his hand upon the head of his oblation, and kill it before the tent of meeting: and Aaron`s sons shall sprinkle the blood thereof upon the altar round about.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he shall offer of the sacrifice of peace-offerings an offering made by fire unto Jehovah; the fat thereof, the fat tail entire, he shall take away hard by the backbone; and the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, which is by the loins, and the caul upon the liver, with the kidneys, shall he take away.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the priest shall burn it upon the altar: it is the food of the offering made by fire unto Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And if his oblation be a goat, then he shall offer it before Jehovah:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and he shall lay his hand upon the head of it, and kill it before the tent of meeting; and the sons of Aaron shall sprinkle the blood thereof upon the altar round about.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he shall offer thereof his oblation, [even] an offering made by fire unto Jehovah; the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, which is by the loins, and the caul upon the liver, with the kidneys, shall he take away.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the priest shall burn them upon the altar: it is the food of the offering made by fire, for a sweet savor; all the fat is Jehovah`s.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: It shall be a perpetual statute throughout your generations in all your dwellings, that ye shall eat neither fat nor blood.
